name: NOP
description: No operation

name: BZE
description: Branch if zero: conditional jump to address adr

name: JMP
description: Non-conditional jump to address adr

name: JSR
description: Jump to subroutine

name: RTS
description: Return from subroutine

name: EXIT
description: Exit – stops machine execution

name: INPC
description: Input character from keyboard

name: INP
description: Input integer from keyboard

name: INPR
description: Input real number from keyboard

name: OUTC
description: Output character to screen

name: OUT
description: Output integer to screen

name: OUTR
description: Output real number to screen

name: POP
description: Pop word from stack to accumulator A

name: POPR
description: Pop real number from stack to register R

name: PUSH
description: Push word in A on the stack

name: PUSHR
description: Push real number in R on the stack

name: LDA
description: Load value to A from memory cell at address adr

name: LDA'M
description: Load value val to A from memory address PC+1 (immediate addressing)

name: LDA'I
description: Load value to A from memory cell at address M[adr] (indirect addressing)

name: LDA'X
description: Load value to A from memory cell at address val+X (indexed addressing)

name: LDR
description: Load value from memory cell at adr to RL, and value from cell at addr+1 to RH

name: LDR'I
description: Load value from memory cell at M[adr] to RL, and from M[adr] + 1] to RH (indirect addressing)

name: STA
description: Store value from accumulator A to memory cell at address adr

name: STA'I
description: Store value from accumulator A to memory cell at address M[adr] (indirect addressing)

name: STR'I
description: Load value from RL to cell at address M[adr], and from RH to M[adr] + 1] (indirect addressing)

name: LDX
description: Load from memory to index register X

name: STX
description: Store from index register X to memory

name: LDS
description: Load fro memory to stack pointer SP

name: STS
description: Store from stack pointer SP to memory

name: OR
description: Disjunction operation

name: AND
description: Conjunction operation

name: NOT
description: Negation operation

name: EQ
description: Sets A to 1 if A equals M[adr], otherwise sets A to 0

name: NE
description: Sets A to 1 if A is not equal to M[adr], otherwise sets A to 0

name: LT
description: Sets A to 1 if A is less than M[adr] (integer comparison), otherwise 0

name: LE
description: Sets A to 1 if A is less than or equal to M[adr] (integer comparison), otherwise 0

name: GT
description: Sets A to 1 if A is greater than M[adr] (integer comparison), otherwise 0

name: GE
description: Sets A to 1 if A is greater than or equal to M[adr] (integer comparison), otherwise 0

name: EQR
description: Sets A to 1 if register R equals the real number stored at adr, otherwise 0

name: NER
description: Sets A to 1 if register R is not equal to the real number stored at adr, otherwise 0

name: LTR
description: Sets A to 1 if register R is less than the real number stored at adr, otherwise 0

name: LER
description: Sets A to 1 if register R is less than or equal to the real number stored at adr, otherwise 0

name: GTR
description: Sets A to 1 if register R is greater than the real number stored at adr, otherwise 0

name: GER
description: Sets A to 1 if register R is greater than or equal to the real number stored at adr, otherwise 0

name: ADD
description: Adds the integer value stored at M[adr] to A

name: ADD'M
description: Adds the immediate integer value val to A

name: SUB
description: Subtracts the integer value stored at M[adr] from A

name: SUB'M
description: Subtracts the immediate integer value val from A

name: MUL
description: Multiplies A by the integer value stored at M[adr]

name: DIV
description: Divides A by the integer value stored at M[adr]

name: NEG
description: Negates the value in A

name: ADDR
description: Adds the real number stored at adr to register R

name: SUBR
description: Subtracts the real number stored at adr from register R

name: MULR
description: Multiplies register R by the real number stored at adr

name: DIVR
description: Divides register R by the real number stored at adr

name: NEGR
description: Negates the real number stored in register R
